name: Simplending Financial
description_short: Simplending Financial is a nationwide private money lender specializing in real estate investment financing, offering fix-and-flip, rental, bridge, and ground-up construction loans with 3-5 business day funding.
description_long:
Simplending Financial is a private lending company founded by Janine Cascio, a lender with over a decade of experience in real estate investment financing. The company positions itself as a nationwide alternative to traditional banks for real estate investors seeking capital quickly and with less bureaucratic friction. Based in Houston, Texas, they operate primarily in the private lending space, catering to experienced and repeat investors who need funding for real estate projects.

The company offers multiple loan products under branded names: SimpleFlip (fix-and-flip properties), SimpleBuild (ground-up construction), SimpleRent (single-property and multifamily rentals), and SimpleBridge (bridge financing). They explicitly market themselves as faster and more flexible than traditional bank lending, with stated funding timelines of 3-5 business days. Their loan offerings include Fix & Flip, Ground Up, Single Property Rental, Multifamily Bridge, Rental Portfolio, and Multifamily Term loans.

Simplending Financial differentiates itself through speed, simplified underwriting compared to banks, and a customer-focused approach. They emphasize flexibility in loan structure, the option to buy down rates on long-term loans, competitive pricing, and a streamlined three-step process: submit deal, review deal, fund deal. The company highlights repeat clients and testimonials from seasoned investors, suggesting a track record with professional borrowers.

However, prospective borrowers should note that private money lending typically carries higher interest rates and more stringent equity requirements than conventional mortgages. The company's website lacks transparency on specific rates, terms, loan-to-value ratios, or minimum credit score requirements. This is a specialized product for real estate investors, not a general consumer mortgage lender, and borrowing costs will be significantly higher than traditional home financing. The focus on real estate investment properties—not primary residences—and the emphasis on repeat, experienced investors suggests this is not suitable for first-time homebuyers or consumer mortgage needs.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast funding timeline: 3-5 business days, significantly faster than traditional bank mortgages
Specialized expertise: Founder Janine Cascio has over a decade of real estate lending experience
Multiple branded loan products: SimpleFlip, SimpleBuild, SimpleRent, SimpleBridge tailored to different investment strategies
Flexible underwriting: Marketed as more responsive and flexible than traditional banks
Rate buydown option: Ability to reduce interest rates on long-term loans
Nationwide lending: Services real estate investors across the country, not limited to Texas
Repeat client focus: Testimonials show strong retention among experienced investors
cons: No transparent rate disclosure: Website does not publish interest rates, making cost comparison impossible
Higher costs than traditional mortgages: Private lending inherently carries premium rates due to risk profile
Limited loan documentation: No specific details on LTV requirements, minimum credit scores, or loan terms
Specialized product only: Exclusively for real estate investment properties; cannot be used for primary residence purchases
Minimal regulatory transparency: No disclosure of licensing, regulatory oversight, or compliance frameworks
best_for: Experienced real estate investors needing quick funding for fix-and-flip properties
Real estate professionals scaling their portfolio who need capital faster than traditional lenders
Investors purchasing rental properties or multifamily buildings requiring bridge financing
Real estate developers financing ground-up construction projects outside conventional lending timelines
diagnosis: Simplending Financial is best for experienced real estate investors and professionals who need rapid, flexible capital for investment properties and can tolerate higher private lending rates in exchange for speed and underwriting flexibility. The main caveat is that this is not a consumer mortgage product—it is exclusively for real estate investment purposes, carries significantly higher costs than conventional financing, and lacks transparency on key pricing and term details, making independent rate comparison difficult.
services: Fix and Flip loans for property renovation and resale projects
Ground Up construction loans for new development projects
Single Property Rental loans for buy-and-hold residential investments
Multifamily Bridge financing for transitional commercial real estate
Rental Portfolio loans for investors with multiple properties
Multifamily Term loans for long-term commercial real estate holdings
Rate buydown options to reduce interest on long-term loans
Fast funding and closing services (3-5 business day timeline)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 720 N Post Oak Rd # 124, Houston, TX 77024
